title: App-Store Rating Drift, Review-Sentiment Topic Modelling, and Public-Review-to-Uninstall Correlation
industry: Retail, Media, Financial Services, Travel, Telecommunications — mobile-first segments where storefront discovery, ASO budgets, and uninstall economics move faster than quarterly VOC survey readouts.
dataSources:
Primary unified index `index=mobile_store_intel` combining vendor-normalised sourcetypes tied to **public** storefront APIs—not Qualtrics-led VOC (**UC-23.1.4**) nor SDK-only crash telemetry (**UC-23.1.6**) nor browser form abandonment (**UC-23.1.8**).
• **`googleplay:user_review`** — Android Publisher **`reviews.list`** JSON (`comments[].userComment.text`, `userComment.starRating`, `userComment.lastModified`, `developerComment.text`).
• **`appstore:customer_review`** — App Store Connect **`GET /v1/customerReviews`** (`attributes.rating`, `attributes.body`, `attributes.reviewerNickname`, `attributes.createdDate`, `attributes.territory`).
• **`appfollow:review_event`** — optional aggregator bridging Apple plus Google feeds plus translations (`api.appfollow.io`).
• **`googleplay:statistics_aggregation`** — retention/uninstall proxies vs acquisition dimensions (`play/v1/statistics/aggregations`).
• **`appstore:analytics_report`** / **`appstore:sales_report`** — Analytics Reports API CSV shards replacing legacy analytics extracts.
• **`firebase:user_session`** / **`adjust:install_event`** / **`appsflyer:install_event`** — uninstall hints plus paid-vs-organic attribution joins.
• **`googleplay:vitals_event`** — corroborating crash/ANR bursts referenced alongside sentiment spikes.
• NLP enrichment sourcetypes **`aws:comprehend:sentiment`**, **`gcp:nlp:sentiment_event`**, **`openai:gpt_classification`** keyed by hashed review identifiers plus **`aspect_topic`** assignments (**UI**, **performance**, **features**, **support**, **pricing**).
Representative onboarding excerpts:
Apple review payload snippet referencing **`attributes.createdDate`** ISO-8601 plus **`relationships.response`** developer reply IDs.
Google payload referencing **`comments[0].userComment.starRating`** integer plus **`lastModified`** millis.
Translation hops optionally logged via **`aws:translate`** / **`google_translate`** companion indexes kept segregated for privacy reviews.
app: Splunk HTTP Event Collector ([Splunk Docs — HTTP Event Collector](https://docs.splunk.com/Documentation/Splunk/latest/Data/UsetheHTTPEventCollector)) plus Heavy Forwarder modular inputs executing Python pollers for Apple JWT-authenticated App Store Connect REST, OAuth2 Google Play Android Publisher endpoints, optional AppFollow REST, Firebase exports, or Splunk DB Connect ([Splunkbase 2686](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2686)) warehouse mirrors—choose packaging consistent with InfoSec governance.
spl:
index=mobile_store_intel earliest=-90d@d latest=now
(sourcetype="googleplay:user_review" OR sourcetype="appstore:customer_review" OR sourcetype="appfollow:review_event")
| eval rating=tonumber(coalesce(attributes_rating,userComment_starRating,star_rating,rating))
| eval review_epoch=coalesce(
    strptime(createdDate,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%3NZ"),
    strptime(lastModified,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"),
    strptime(review_created,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
    _time)
| eval review_day=strftime(review_epoch,"%Y-%m-%d")
| eval territory=lower(trim(coalesce(attributes_territory,reviewerLanguage,country_iso,"")))
| eval platform=case(sourcetype="googleplay:user_review","android",sourcetype="appstore:customer_review","ios",sourcetype="appfollow:review_event",lower(trim(coalesce(store_os,app_platform,"mixed"))),1=1,"unknown")
| eval aspect_topic=lower(trim(coalesce(topic_aspect,nlp_aspect,abcd_aspect,"mixed")))
| eval sentiment_score=tonumber(coalesce(compound_sentiment_score,nlp_sent_score,""))
| eval sentiment_bucket=case(isnum(sentiment_score) AND sentiment_score<-0.25,"negative",isnum(sentiment_score) AND sentiment_score>0.25,"positive",isnum(sentiment_score),"neutral",rating<=2,"negative",rating>=4,"positive",1=1,"neutral")
| eval developer_reply_ms=if(isnotnull(response_created_epoch),response_created_epoch-review_epoch,null())
| bin review_epoch span=1d
| eval _time=review_epoch
| stats count as reviews_per_day,
    sum(eval(if(rating<=2 OR sentiment_bucket=="negative",1,0))) as neg_reviews,
    sum(eval(if(rating>=4 OR sentiment_bucket=="positive",1,0))) as pos_reviews,
    dc(eval(if(isnotnull(developer_reply_ms),"review_id",null()))) as responded_reviews,
    avg(developer_reply_ms) as avg_reply_latency_ms,
    dc(reviewer_hash) as distinct_reviewers,
    values(platform) as platforms,
    values(territory) as territories
  by _time, aspect_topic
| eval net_sentiment_score=round(100*(pos_reviews-neg_reviews)/nullif(pos_reviews+neg_reviews,0),2)
| eventstats avg(reviews_per_day) as baseline_mu stdev(reviews_per_day) as baseline_sigma by aspect_topic
| eval velocity_anomaly=if(reviews_per_day > baseline_mu + 3 * baseline_sigma AND neg_reviews > 15,1,0)
| eval review_response_rate_pct=round(100*responded_reviews/nullif(reviews_per_day,0),1)
| streamstats window=28 global=f avg(net_sentiment_score) as rolling_ns_baseline by aspect_topic
| eval aspect_sentiment_drift=round(net_sentiment_score - rolling_ns_baseline,3)
| join type=left _time [
    search index=mobile_store_intel earliest=-97d@d latest=now
      (sourcetype="googleplay:statistics_aggregation" OR sourcetype="firebase:user_session")
    | eval uninstall_proxy=tonumber(coalesce(daily_deletions,daily_uninstalls,churn_day_count,"0"))
    | bin _time span=1d
    | stats sum(uninstall_proxy) as uninstall_events by _time ]
| eval uninstall_corr_hint=if(isnotnull(uninstall_events) AND neg_reviews>30,"review_surge_vs_uninstall_slice","monitor")
| eval drift_pair_flag=if(aspect_sentiment_drift < -0.3 OR velocity_anomaly==1 OR review_response_rate_pct < 30,"investigate","ok")
| sort - velocity_anomaly - neg_reviews
| table _time aspect_topic platforms territories reviews_per_day neg_reviews pos_reviews net_sentiment_score aspect_sentiment_drift velocity_anomaly review_response_rate_pct avg_reply_latency_ms distinct_reviewers uninstall_events uninstall_corr_hint drift_pair_flag
| head 400
description: Splunk merges Apple **`appstore:customer_review`** rows ( **`attributes.rating`**, **`attributes.body`**, **`attributes.territory`**, **`relationships.response`** ), Google **`googleplay:user_review`** payloads (**`userComment.starRating`**, multilingual **`comments[].userComment.text`** ), optional **`appfollow:review_event`** unified feeds, NLP-derived **`aspect_topic`** + **`sentiment_bucket`** classifications from **AWS Comprehend**, **GCP Natural Language**, or GPT batches, plus **`googleplay:statistics_aggregation`** / **`firebase:user_session`** uninstall proxies so Growth + Mobile leadership detect **rating drift** post-release, **velocity anomalies** (**μ + 3σ** against thirty-day baselines), **Net Sentiment Score** swings, **developer-response KPI gaps**, **ASO impression-to-install regression signals** joined via lookups, **paid-vs-organic review-quality divergence**, and SOC-fed **brigade-pattern hints**—distinct from XM surveys (**UC-23.1.4**), SDK-only crashes (**UC-23.1.6**), and browser funnel friction (**UC-23.1.8**).
value: Executive sponsors defend ASO spend and roadmap sequencing using storefront-native facts: tying **`neg_reviews`** acceleration to **`uninstall_events`** with **`lag`** experimentation exposes acquisition misfires sooner than quarterly VOC decks—benchmark citations (**AppTweak ASO 2024 Benchmark Report**, **Sensor Tower 2024 Mobile App Trends**, **AppsFlyer 2024 State of App Marketing**, **Adjust 2024 App Trends**) contextualise severity without outsourcing judgement to opaque dashboards alone. Legal plus Trust teams gain quantitative hooks when **`velocity_anomaly`** coincides with **`distinct_reviewers`** collapses plus SOC cosine-similarity exports (**>0.85**) referencing brigades rather than narrative guesses.
implementation: Stand up authenticated collectors: mint Apple **`JWT`** (**Issuer ID**, **Key ID**, `.p8`) capped **50 req/sec/team**, schedule Android Publisher **`reviews.list`** respecting daily quotas, optionally ingest AppFollow unified feeds for bilingual QA teams. Forward JSON via Splunk **HTTP Event Collector** into **`mobile_store_intel`** with **`review_hash`** dedup macros; attach **`release_calendar.csv`** plus **`aso_keyword_baseline.csv`** lookups; pipeline NLP classifications through segregated indexes when **`review_body`** crosses locales.
visualization: Dashboard Studio **`splunk.line`** plotting **`net_sentiment_score`** vs **`rolling_ns_baseline`** trellised by **`aspect_topic`**; **`splunk.singlevalue`** spotlight on **`velocity_anomaly`**; **`splunk.table`** ranking **`review_response_rate_pct`**, **`avg_reply_latency_ms`**, **`distinct_reviewers`**; choropleth or matrix panels on **`territory`** when geographic facets feed Splunk; overlay **`uninstall_events`** secondary axis referencing **`googleplay:statistics_aggregation`** extracts.

references.title: Apple Developer Documentation — App Store Connect API (customer reviews)
AppFollow Developer Hub — REST API overview
Splunk Docs — Use the HTTP Event Collector
Google Play Console Help — Android vitals
Google Cloud Documentation — Natural Language sentiment analysis

knownFalsePositives: Storefront-wide **seasonal peaks** inflate **reviews_per_day** while **rating** medians remain flat, triggering **velocity** alarms until **retail_calendar** exclusions land. **Apple** or **Google** featuring shifts countries first, so **territory** skew looks like crises though code never regressed—trellis by **ISO-3166** before executive readouts. **Phased rollout** leaves **canary** cohorts louder about a **crash** fixed days later on **stable**, so **aspect_sentiment_drift** on **performance** misleads until **release_calendar** percentages annotate mix. **NLP upgrades** retag **aspect_topic** labels overnight, inventing **topic-frequency surges** absent behavioural shifts—partition by **`model_version`**. **Mandatory OS updates** plus **credential migrations** spike **login** vitriol unrelated to feature backlogs—correlate with **SDK** adoption curves. **Paid acquisition cohorts** show harsher **rating** averages per public **AppsFlyer** marketing studies yet reflect targeting mistakes—not core craft—until **campaign** joins succeed. **Aggregated ASN** clustering flags **campus Wi-Fi** during orientation week as faux brigades—validate **account_age** signals before Legal paging. **Dual pollers** (RSS plus API) double-count Apple reviews until **dedup** macros align. **Google policy purges** removing spam waves reduce daily volume resembling product wins without merges. **Cross-app news** (**airline outage**, **bank failure**) sparks one-star solidarity unrelated to release quality—monitor **named-entity** spikes. **Localization double-translation** pipelines distort **sentiment_bucket** thresholds even when native reviewers felt neutral—inspect **language_chain** metadata.
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
• Heavy Forwarder or Splunk Cloud HTTP Event Collector collectors with outbound HTTPS to `api.appstoreconnect.apple.com`, `androidpublisher.googleapis.com`, `oauth2.googleapis.com`, optional `api.appfollow.io`, plus Splunk HEC endpoints; version aligned with `splunkVersions` above.
• Apple Developer Program credentials granting App Store Connect API keys (**Issuer ID**, **Key ID**, `.p8` private key material) plus Google Cloud **Android Publisher API** OAuth2 **service-account JSON** stored outside Git alongside quarterly rotation attestations.
• Python 3.10+ plus libraries `jwt`, `cryptography`, `requests`, `google-auth`, `csv` streaming sufficient for ES256 JWT mint (**aud**=`https://appleid.apple.com`) respecting published **50 requests/sec/team** ceilings aggregated across every automation sharing one Connect team key.
• Splunk DB Connect ([Splunkbase 2686](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2686)) optional when warehouses mirror Sensor Tower or data.ai extracts rather than hitting REST storefront endpoints directly from Splunk infrastructure.
• Index `mobile_store_intel` with role/`authorize.conf` alignment; size hot tier for >500MB/day JSON bursts common during viral spikes.

**Step 1 — Configure data collection**
**Path A (Apple primary):** Log into App Store Connect → Users and Access → Keys → Generate **App Store Connect API** key; note **Issuer ID**, download `.p8`, bind **Key ID**. Mint short-lived JWT assertions (**alg** ES256, **iss** Issuer ID, **exp** ≤ twenty minutes, **aud** `https://appleid.apple.com`) then exchange them for bearer tokens hitting `GET https://api.appstoreconnect.apple.com/v1/customerReviews?filter[app]={appId}` following pagination via `links.next` until exhaustion. Persist `attributes.rating`, `attributes.title`, `attributes.body`, `attributes.reviewerNickname`, `attributes.createdDate`, `attributes.territory`, `relationships.response` into sourcetype `appstore:customer_review`. Back off exponentially on HTTP **429** responses beginning **250ms**, doubling capped **30s**, honour `Retry-After` headers Apple occasionally emits during coordinated worldwide releases.

**Path B (Google Play primary):** Enable Google Play **Android Publisher API** inside Google Cloud Console; create OAuth **service-account JSON** with `androidpublisher` scope; invoke `reviews.list` against `androidpublisher.googleapis.com/androidpublisher/v3/applications/{packageName}/reviews`, capturing `comments[].userComment.text`, `userComment.starRating`, `userComment.lastModified`, `userComment.reviewerLanguage`, `developerComment.text`. Persist pagination revision tokens separately per `packageName` so Splunk never double-counts the same reviewer revision inside daily buckets—duplicate pagination bugs inflate `reviews_per_day` dramatically.

**Path C (aggregator SaaS):** Poll optional `GET https://api.appfollow.io/api/v2/reviews` (`appfollow:review_event`) when bilingual QA squads insist on AppFollow-managed translations plus competitor benchmarks rather than bespoke AWS Translate pipelines.

Path D (analytics denominators): Land `googleplay:statistics_aggregation` uninstall/acquisition slices plus `appstore:analytics_report` / `appstore:sales_report` CSV shards tied to Analytics Reports API jobs Apple positions as successors to older analytics summaries (post-June 2025 messaging).

Path E (attribution overlays): Mirror `adjust:install_event`, `appsflyer:install_event`, `firebase:user_session` rows exposing `campaign`, `network_name`, `is_organic` flags so Splunk dashboards expose paid cohort harshness versus organic installs—distinct from handset reliability instrumentation (**UC-23.1.6**).

Indexer `props.conf` illustration:

```
[googleplay:user_review]
KV_MODE = json
SHOULD_LINEMERGE = false
TRUNCATE = 1000000
TIME_PREFIX = "lastModified"
TIME_FORMAT = %Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z
MAX_TIMESTAMP_LOOKAHEAD = 40
```

Mirror analogous `KV_MODE=json` blocks for **`appstore:customer_review`** bodies. Heavy Forwarder `inputs.conf` example using `poll_play_reviews_hec.py`, `interval = 900`—tune after measuring pagination latency.

**Step 2 — Create the search and alert**
Paste the canonical SPL copied below (same body as top-level `spl` field), then Save As → Report or Alert.

```spl
index=mobile_store_intel earliest=-90d@d latest=now
(sourcetype="googleplay:user_review" OR sourcetype="appstore:customer_review" OR sourcetype="appfollow:review_event")
| eval rating=tonumber(coalesce(attributes_rating,userComment_starRating,star_rating,rating))
| eval review_epoch=coalesce(
    strptime(createdDate,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%3NZ"),
    strptime(lastModified,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"),
    strptime(review_created,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
    _time)
| eval review_day=strftime(review_epoch,"%Y-%m-%d")
| eval territory=lower(trim(coalesce(attributes_territory,reviewerLanguage,country_iso,"")))
| eval platform=case(sourcetype="googleplay:user_review","android",sourcetype="appstore:customer_review","ios",sourcetype="appfollow:review_event",lower(trim(coalesce(store_os,app_platform,"mixed"))),1=1,"unknown")
| eval aspect_topic=lower(trim(coalesce(topic_aspect,nlp_aspect,abcd_aspect,"mixed")))
| eval sentiment_score=tonumber(coalesce(compound_sentiment_score,nlp_sent_score,""))
| eval sentiment_bucket=case(isnum(sentiment_score) AND sentiment_score<-0.25,"negative",isnum(sentiment_score) AND sentiment_score>0.25,"positive",isnum(sentiment_score),"neutral",rating<=2,"negative",rating>=4,"positive",1=1,"neutral")
| eval developer_reply_ms=if(isnotnull(response_created_epoch),response_created_epoch-review_epoch,null())
| bin review_epoch span=1d
| eval _time=review_epoch
| stats count as reviews_per_day,
    sum(eval(if(rating<=2 OR sentiment_bucket=="negative",1,0))) as neg_reviews,
    sum(eval(if(rating>=4 OR sentiment_bucket=="positive",1,0))) as pos_reviews,
    dc(eval(if(isnotnull(developer_reply_ms),"review_id",null()))) as responded_reviews,
    avg(developer_reply_ms) as avg_reply_latency_ms,
    dc(reviewer_hash) as distinct_reviewers,
    values(platform) as platforms,
    values(territory) as territories
  by _time, aspect_topic
| eval net_sentiment_score=round(100*(pos_reviews-neg_reviews)/nullif(pos_reviews+neg_reviews,0),2)
| eventstats avg(reviews_per_day) as baseline_mu stdev(reviews_per_day) as baseline_sigma by aspect_topic
| eval velocity_anomaly=if(reviews_per_day > baseline_mu + 3 * baseline_sigma AND neg_reviews > 15,1,0)
| eval review_response_rate_pct=round(100*responded_reviews/nullif(reviews_per_day,0),1)
| streamstats window=28 global=f avg(net_sentiment_score) as rolling_ns_baseline by aspect_topic
| eval aspect_sentiment_drift=round(net_sentiment_score - rolling_ns_baseline,3)
| join type=left _time [
    search index=mobile_store_intel earliest=-97d@d latest=now
      (sourcetype="googleplay:statistics_aggregation" OR sourcetype="firebase:user_session")
    | eval uninstall_proxy=tonumber(coalesce(daily_deletions,daily_uninstalls,churn_day_count,"0"))
    | bin _time span=1d
    | stats sum(uninstall_proxy) as uninstall_events by _time ]
| eval uninstall_corr_hint=if(isnotnull(uninstall_events) AND neg_reviews>30,"review_surge_vs_uninstall_slice","monitor")
| eval drift_pair_flag=if(aspect_sentiment_drift < -0.3 OR velocity_anomaly==1 OR review_response_rate_pct < 30,"investigate","ok")
| sort - velocity_anomaly - neg_reviews
| table _time aspect_topic platforms territories reviews_per_day neg_reviews pos_reviews net_sentiment_score aspect_sentiment_drift velocity_anomaly review_response_rate_pct avg_reply_latency_ms distinct_reviewers uninstall_events uninstall_corr_hint drift_pair_flag
| head 400
```

The opening **`index`/`sourcetype`** tuple unions **`googleplay:user_review`**, **`appstore:customer_review`**, and **`appfollow:review_event`** so vendor migrations never fork dashboards. The **`stats`** pass rolls up **`reviews_per_day`**, **`neg_reviews`**, **`pos_reviews`**, **`review_response_rate_pct`**, **`distinct_reviewers`** while keeping **`aspect_topic`** facets from NLP (**AWS Comprehend**, **GCP Natural Language**, GPT batches). **`eventstats`** yields **`baseline_mu`**/**`baseline_sigma`** for velocity anomalies (**μ + 3σ** guardrail plus **`neg_reviews>15`**). **`streamstats`** (**twenty-eight days**) feeds **`aspect_sentiment_drift`** versus **`rolling_ns_baseline`**. **`join`** attaches **`googleplay:statistics_aggregation`**/**`firebase:user_session`** **`uninstall_events`** by **`_time`** day buckets—pairing review surges with churn hints without claiming causality.

**Step 3 — Validate storefront parity**
Daily reconcile **`reviews_per_day`** versus Google Play Console › Ratings and reviews (**Production** track only)—keep internal/testing floods partitioned.

Weekly reconcile **`neg_reviews`** versus App Store Connect › Trends › Reviews—territories aggregate independently, so isolate **ISO** filters before blending.

Harmonise `uninstall_events` overlays by aligning `_time` to UTC midnight prior to trusting `uninstall_corr_hint` labels—Firebase retention exports lag twenty-four to thirty-six hours behind Pacific-first Play batches depending on ingestion geography.

Instrument `distinct_reviewers` distributions versus hashed reviewer-age lookups SOC forwards—helps differentiate brigaded infant accounts (`< seven days`) from legitimate regressions.

Cross-check `review_response_rate_pct` versus consoles—AppFollow cites ~96h median / ~27h top-quartile reply delays directionally only.

**Step 4 — Operationalize**
Publish **Dashboard Studio** boards enumerated under `visualization`: `splunk.line` overlays `net_sentiment_score` versus `rolling_ns_baseline` trellised by `aspect_topic`; `splunk.singlevalue` spotlight `velocity_anomaly`; `splunk.table` listing `review_response_rate_pct`, `avg_reply_latency_ms`, `distinct_reviewers`; choropleth/matrix `territory` facets when geographic dimensions ingested cleanly.

**Alert routing:** `investigate` rows escalate Growth plus Mobile PM Slack channels referencing `aspect_topic` plus `semantic_version` pulled from `release_calendar.csv` within fifteen minutes when pager-tier thresholds trip (`velocity_anomaly==1` plus `neg_reviews>50`).

Escalate sustained `review_response_rate_pct` dips below **thirty percent** fourteen rolling days toward Community/Support directors referencing AppFollow commentary tying anaemic replies to eventual star erosion—not crash squads absent corroborating `UC-23.1.6` spikes.

Footnotes cite vendor-published bands only (**AppTweak ASO 2024 Benchmark Report**, **Sensor Tower 2024 Mobile App Trends**, **AppsFlyer 2024 State of App Marketing**, **Adjust 2024 App Trends**)—never invent percentages absent publisher tables auditors can retrieve.

Archive weekly PDF snapshots plus alert artefact URLs in finance-controlled shares.

**Step 5 — Troubleshooting**
• `invalid_client` responses minting Apple JWT usually trace mismatched **Issuer ID** versus **Key ID** bindings—rotate keys via Users and Access → Keys UI before deleting legacy `.p8` material from collectors.
• `invalid_grant` responses from Google OAuth hint rotated **service-account JSON**—re-export credentials quarterly alongside IAM attestations.
• **Duplicate ingestion** arises when legacy **iTunes RSS** mirrors duplicate App Store Connect API pulls—disable redundant RSS modular inputs once REST pagination authoritative.
• **HTTP 429** storms persist despite backoff—shard polls across apps or widen `interval` seconds respecting **50 req/sec/team** ceilings aggregated organisation-wide.
• **NLP vendor retunes** shift `aspect_topic` histograms overnight—freeze `nlp_pipeline_version` tags until linguistic QA signs taxonomy deltas.
• **Canary dominance** skews `aspect_sentiment_drift` until `release_calendar.csv` rollout percentages annotate dashboards—never compare stable cohort stars against canary-only complaints.
• **Firebase timezone skew** misaligns `uninstall_events` versus review spikes—normalize `_time` via `strftime`/`UTC` helpers before trusting correlation coefficients computed offline.
• **Campus NAT egress** concentrates benign ASN clustering mistaken for brigades—confirm `reviewer_hash` cardinality stays high despite ASN repetition before escalating Legal.
• **Google policy sweeps** deleting spam waves reduce daily volume resembling quality wins absent merges—annotate policy dates inside runbooks.
• **Paid acquisition bursts** import low-fit personas leaving harsh ratings—blend `campaign` overlays referencing AppsFlyer paid-vs-organic uninstall deltas publicly cited.
• **Keyword ASO regressions** crater `impression_to_install` yet leave `rating` untouched—redirect investigations toward creatives squads rather than sentiment SMEs.
• **Territorial reshuffles** Apple announces quarterly reshuffle storefront mixes—freeze dashboards twenty-four hours post announcement when aggregates oscillate wildly.
grandmaExplanation: We keep an eye on the public star scores and comments people leave on Apple and Android shop pages—not private survey forms—and we notice when unhappy notes pile up after a new version ships. We connect those complaint waves to phones being uninstalled or ad traffic that brought the wrong audience so teams can fix the product story before the listing tanks.
